name: pr-completion
description: Validate and commit local changes, create and watch GitHub pull requests, then request an explicitly approved landing for each exact ready head.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomously prepare, watch, and explicitly land pull requests
interface.longDescription: Discover changed repositories, create validated commits and pull requests, run a deterministic state-machine watcher, repair CI and review failures, resolve conflicts, request per-PR confirmation for the exact ready head, and observe an approved protected landing until merged or blocked.
defaultPrompt: Use $pr-completion:take-pr-to-completion to prepare and watch each pull request, ask me for per-PR landing confirmation at verified readiness, then observe any approved landing until merged or blocked.
